functions.title: Guide Book #76
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #76§r
§lCobbled Deepslate Golem§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Golem, Earth-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: All deepslate underground, Deepslate Catacombs.

•§lSummon through§r: Summoning Scroll
•§lHealth§r: 60 §o(Wild)§r | 80 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lKnockback resistance§r: 0.5
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.2
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water, Solid Blocks.
•§lHealed by§r: Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate.

•§lTamed by§r: Enchanted Emerald
•§lPossible drops§r: Cobbled Deepslate, Diamond, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Wild)§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Monsters,

Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 7-8
•Wild Cobbled Deepslate Golem can sleep during the day.
•Tamed Cobbled Deepslate Golem can be sat down.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
